title: ticanto crista
intro: Ticanto crista plant, also known as 'Plectranthus fruticosus', is a shrub-like perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal medicine, ticanto crista is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
